headline: MongoDB Q4 Earnings & Revenues Surpass Estimates, Both Increase Y/Y
summary: MDB surpasses Q4 FY26 expectations with strong revenue growth and Atlas contributing 72% of total quarterly revenues.

headline: GAIN UNBEATABLE SAVINGS THIS SPRING WITH PLANET FITNESS' PERKSFEST
summary: Planet Fitness, one of the largest and fastest-growing franchisors and operators of fitness centers with more members than any other fitness brand, announced today the return of PerksFest, a celebration of limited-time member-exclusive deals and discounts from top brands.

raw.headline: GAIN UNBEATABLE SAVINGS THIS SPRING WITH PLANET FITNESS' PERKSFEST

headline: Zacks Investment Ideas feature highlights: Garmin and Apple
summary: Garmin stock nears breakout after beat-and-raise Q4, record revenue, 33% Fitness surge, and a $500M buyback. Is GRMN set for another run?
